strengths: Extensive TypeScript and Node.js expertise across multiple senior roles (re:cinq, Optilyz, RIDE Capital)
Proven full-stack development capability with React and backend experience spanning production systems
Strong software craftsmanship foundation (TDD, pair programming, CI/CD) demonstrated through workshops and community contributions
concerns: Staff-level engineer applying for entry-level Junior/Mid-level position creates substantial retention and role-fit risk
Unexplained 9-month career gap (October 2025–July 2026) following Staff role raises questions about stability and motivation
No demonstrated PostgreSQL expertise despite being a required skill; resume shows MongoDB (Optilyz) and generic SQL/MySQL elsewhere
response.justification: Despite strong TypeScript and full-stack capabilities, this Staff-level engineer presents a poor fit for an entry-level role. The severe overqualification creates likely retention risk—developers at this seniority typically advance to more complex problems rather than junior workflows. The unexplained 9-month career gap compounds concerns about stability. While PostgreSQL is required and the candidate shows relational database exposure, no explicit PostgreSQL experience is documented (only MongoDB at most recent role), representing a technical gap in a role requiring specific database expertise. The mismatch in seniority level, combined with unanswered career progression questions, argues against advancing.
